description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Unix-based systems (Linux and macOS) and one for Windows. The Unix job should use a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Debug and Release configurations. The Windows job should use a matrix strategy to run with Debug and Release configurations on windows-latest. For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies, cache the build, configure, build, and run tests.
